rationale: CSS-only changes with no runtime logic modifications. The heavy lifting (viewport-fit=cover, dvh units, visualViewport listener, button safe-area insets) was completed in US-028. This plan correctly identifies and closes the remaining gaps: overscroll-behavior, touch-action, and overlay safe-area padding. The medium-risk item (touch-action: none vs pointer entropy) is mitigated — pointer.ts uses Pointer Events API (pointermove/pointerenter/pointerleave), which fire regardless of touch-action. No architectural concerns.
recommendations: Verify that .eavi-info-panel max-height accounts for safe-area padding so content remains scrollable on small screens in landscape with notch
Consider adding -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch as a fallback if .eavi-info-panel content becomes scrollable
